summary: review-v3 ISSUE-3 resolved: the user performed the live visual UI checks for the resume export controls (mobile/wide layout, light/dark appearance, reduced-motion, on-device focus walk, 44px touch targets) and explicitly signed off. This closes the Sprint Contract's manual UI verification — the only remaining blocker. No code change this pass; ISSUE-1/ISSUE-2 already RESOLVED in review-v1.
